# Firewall Allowlist for Copilot Agents

If your agent runs behind a restrictive firewall, allow these hosts. Always check the official guidance for updates.

```plaintext
agents.md
agentskills.io
airflow.apache.org
aka.ms
angular.dev
ansible.com
anthropic.com

coder.com
context7.com
contribute.jquery.org
contributor-covenant.org
cs.arizona.edu
cssguidelin.es
dev.to
docs.datadoghq.com
docs.djangoproject.com
docs.name.com
docs.pydantic.dev
docs.z.ai

en.wikibooks.org

gh.io
ghcr.io
github.blog
github.com

guides.github.com

img.shields.io
isocpp.github.io
kotlinlang.org

platform.claude.com
```

Note: Keep the list sorted alphabetically for easier maintenance.

Reference: <https://gh.io/copilot/firewall-config>
